title: Fleet poller record
description: One record per fleet repo, emitted by the poller and consumed by the metrics shipper (and `collect --poller-records`). Null values mean "unknown" — a workflow that never completed or succeeded, a data path with no commits — and emit no metric series.

fleet.description: Fleet name, carried through from the jurisdiction record

config.description: Lineage: file name of the fleet config the record was derived from

paused.description: Carried through from the jurisdiction record; labels every series

polled_at.description: Lineage: ISO 8601 UTC time the GitHub data was fetched; collect defaults the series timestamp from it

workflows.description: One entry per expected workflow that was successfully polled

latest_conclusion.description: Conclusion of the most recent completed run; null when no completed run is visible among the most recent runs (never ran, or every run in the window is still active)

hours_since_success.description: Hours since the last successful run; null when it never succeeded

data_commit_age_hours.description: Hours since the last commit touching the repo's data path; null when none exists or the query failed

errors.description: Per-repo poll failures, recorded and skipped — never fatal to the sweep
